title: ROGUE LIBERATION LIBRARY - 211info
text: PEACE HOUSE ROGUE LIBERATION LIBRARY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts new or lightly used paperback books (no written notes or highlighting on pages) and sends them by request to all state prisons in the western United States and federal prisons nationwide. Volunteer opportunities are available. 543 S Mountain Avenue Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 482-9625 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 482-9625 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information. Books are accepted in the green donation bin on the front porch of the office. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Book/Magazine Donation Programs Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - PEACE AND JUSTICE EFFORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEACE HOUSE
